blended.narrative: Snowshoe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 11,218 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 61°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
